top_signals.title: Namibia Fuel Retailer Nasan Sees Oil Growth After Vitol Deal
top_signals.summary: Nasan Energies, a Namibian fuel retailer that recently bought stations from Vitol Group, plans to expand operations to service the country’s offshore oil industry that includes TotalEnergies SE and Shell Plc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.summary: Big government must be tested to destruction for serious reform to finally happen

top_signals.summary:

top_signals.title: Talos brings institutional trading tools to Kalshi prediction markets
top_signals.summary: The integration provides institutional clients with access to Kalshi’s event contracts and crypto perpetuals via Talos’ existing trading infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Leeds United investor buys majority stake in Spanish football club
top_signals.summary: The co-owners of Leeds United have purchased a Spanish football club as they expand their multi-club empire. A.Gain – formerly IDC Sports and Entertainment – have added to their minority shareholding in the Elland Road Premier League team with a majority stake in third tier Spanish side Real Zaragoza, based in Aragon.
